Class AlcoholLogRequest

java.lang.Object
ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.AlcoholLogRequest
public class AlcoholLogRequest extends Object
Request body used when creating a new alcohol log entry.

Different fields are relevant depending on the log type. For instance, guestAge, alcoholPercentage, idChecked, and serviceDenied are primarily used for age-check entries, while notes is used for incident descriptions.
